outside_date_extensions.condition: if regulatory approvals not obtained by initial outside date
outside_date_extensions.note: Automatically extends from August 18, 2026 to December 31, 2026 if, before August 18, 2026, all Article VII closing conditions are satisfied/waived or capable of being satisfied (excluding No Legal Restraint and Required Regulatory Approvals).

outside_date_extensions.condition: if regulatory approvals still not obtained by December 31, 2026
outside_date_extensions.note: May extend from December 31, 2026 to March 31, 2027 by mutual written agreement of Parent and the Company.

static_events.label: Outside Date (Ext. 1)
static_events.note: Automatically extends from August 18, 2026 to December 31, 2026 if, before August 18, 2026, all Article VII closing conditions are satisfied/waived or capable of being satisfied (excluding No Legal Restraint and Required Regulatory Approvals).

static_events.label: Outside Date (Ext. 2)
static_events.note: May extend from December 31, 2026 to March 31, 2027 by mutual written agreement of Parent and the Company.

deadline_events.label: Proxy Statement Preliminary Preparation
deadline_events.calculation: Within 45 calendar days of signing, the Company shall prepare and provide the Proxy Statement in preliminary form to Parent.

downstream.label: HSR Waiting Period Expires
downstream.rule: +30 calendar days after HSR filed (statutory — HSR Act, not stated in merger agreement)

downstream.label: SEC Review Period (13E-3)
downstream.rule: Open-ended — SEC has 10 business days initial review; comments may follow

downstream.label: 13E-3 / Proxy Cleared by SEC
downstream.rule: SEC staff completes review; company may mail proxy

downstream.label: SEC Proxy Review Period
downstream.rule: Open-ended — SEC review (typically 10 business days for preliminary proxy)

downstream.label: Proxy Mailed to Shareholders
downstream.rule: After SEC clearance — typically ≥20 calendar days before meeting

downstream.label: Closing
downstream.rule: +10 Business Days after all conditions satisfied / waived

checklist: HSR actual filing date (Troy ParentCo LLC + TXNM)
TXNM Energy, Inc. stockholder meeting date (vote)
